prompt: pesquisa profunda sobre beta-bloqueadores na prevencao primaria de sangramento varicoso --queries "SCite: PREDESCI nonselective beta-blockers, Consensus: beta-blockers portal hypertension"

assertions.text: Report contains findings from at least 2 distinct search legs (e.g., Gemini + Opus researcher, or MCP results + Opus)
Report includes a comparative table or cross-leg comparison section
Report identifies at least 1 convergence OR divergence between search legs
Report contains at least 3 PMIDs or DOIs with verification status (VERIFIED, CANDIDATE, etc.)
Report includes concrete effect sizes with confidence intervals (HR, RR, NNT with CI 95%)
Report includes results from SCite and/or Consensus MCP queries (the user-defined queries)
Report does NOT contain vague claims like 'estudos mostram' without specific citation
